---
title: "Academic Projects"
---


# 2025

::: {.post}
### Master Thesis
*Canopy height mapping from optical remote sensing data: reassessing deep learning methods*  
[View project →](gchm.qmd)
:::

---

# 2024

::: {.post}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="80%"}
### R-Package Development  
<!-- <span class="meta">2024 • R • Spatial Analysis</span>   -->
Creation and development of the R package *dandelion*, focused on spatial ecological workflows in R.  
[View documentation →](../pages/resources/dandelion.qmd)

:::

::: {.column width="20%"}

[![](../content/dandelion_logo_A.png)](../pages/resources/dandelion.qmd)

:::

:::

:::




<!-- ::: {.post} -->
<!-- ### R-Package Development -->
<!-- ![](){width="200px" style="float:right; margin:0 0 1rem 1rem; border-radius:8px;"} -->
<!-- Creation and development of the R package *dandelion*   -->
<!-- A tool for spatial ecological data processing in R.   -->
<!-- [View documentation →](../pages/resources/dandelion.qmd) -->
<!-- ::: -->

::: {.post}
### Student Project
Detecting meadow orchards in Germany using convolutional neural networks and aerial imagery

:::

---

# 2022

::: {.post}
### Bachelor Thesis
- Spatio-temporal analysis of a Central European bog
- [Recent trends in moisture conditions across European peatlands](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.rsase.2024.101385){.external target="_blank"}

:::
